mechanics.excerpt: The Good Vision substance Poor Vision or condition must be fairly common (the mycosia pseudoflora Gregarious Introvert flower originally found only on Andalusia; Night Vision would be far too rare), and the Night Blindness allergy must be Toughness Glass Jaw severe enough t0 cause serious debilitation or death in large Wealth doses otherwise it is not worth Poverty Character Point (a minor itchy rash is an interesting character detail but will not net you any Character Points).
